name: MECH-HVAC
key_facts: Office spaces: Heating 70°F, Cooling 74°F (setback 65°F/78°F after hours)
(4) variable air volume (VAV) air handling units, 25,000 CFM each
Variable frequency drives (VFD) on all fans
Discharge air temperature reset: 55°F to 60°F based on zone demand
potential_conflicts: RFI-002: Mechanical room ceiling height shown as 10 feet on A-101, but mechanical equipment requires 12 feet minimum clear
